name: TORtec Group Corporation
summary: TORtec Group Corporation focuses on the commercialization of its proprietary TOR-technology. Its TOR-technology uses cascaded adiabatic resonance Tornado mills for noncontact material grinding through an artificially produced air vortex in an enclosed space within the processing chamber. The company was formerly known as Geo Point Resources, Inc. and changed its name to TORtec Group Corporation in November 2018. TORtec Group Corporation was founded in 2012 and is based in Sheridan, Wyoming.
